step.title: Load story and tests
step.action: Read the story file and all existing tests for the implementation.

step.title: Assess coverage
step.action: Evaluate test coverage against acceptance criteria. Identify gaps in unit, integration, and edge case tests.

step.title: Generate additional tests if needed
step.action: Write additional tests to cover identified gaps. Focus on boundary conditions and error paths.

step.title: Run test suite
step.action: Run the full test suite to verify all tests pass including any newly added tests.

step.title: Produce QA report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with QA findings.
